title: Planes
questions: Do you travel much by plane? How old were you the first time you flew? Did you enjoy it?
Have you ever flown by helicopter, glider, hot-air balloon, etc?
How safe do you feel on a plane?
Which aspects of flying do you a) most enjoy and b) least enjoy?
What is the worst thing that has ever happened to you during a flight?
Have you ever suffered delays at an airport or had a flight cancelled? What did you do?
Would you like to have a pilot's license? Would you be interested in flying large planes, small planes, helicopters or something else? Why?
What were you doing when you found out that the World Trade Centre twin towers had been hit by hijacked planes on September 9th, 2001?
How likely do you think it is that a similar terrorist incident involving a plane will happen again?
What changes do you think need to be made to air travel security measures in order to reduce the terrorist threat?
Would you feel safer with or without an armed guard on your flight when flying to a high-risk country?
What concerns you more when you fly: safety (for example, plane maintenance, technological faults or human errors) or security (for example, hijackings or bombings)?
How would life be different if people stopped travelling by plane? What are the disadvantages and the advantages of alternative means of travel?
